form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr2) over 1720m at Penrith was 7th-8.87 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Clara Rocks (2:04.10) in NR up to 52 on March 20 at $34. At the run before good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 4.5 m by King Hit (1:54.60) in NR up to 57 on March 13 at $21. Likely improver from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr8) over 1609m at this track beaten 6 m by Captain Groove (1:53.50) in NR up to 63 on April 2 at $14. Drawn favourably and is worth another chance.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr6) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track beaten 5 m by Captain Groove (1:53.50) in NR up to 63 on April 2 at $8.50. Showed ability the outing before when he raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by a neck after showing early speed, (Fr6) at this track (2:29.00) beating Hes My Reason in NR up to 58 on March 28 at $26 at the bell was 3rd-4. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up won by 2.5 m as favourite (Sr2) at Bathurst (2:04.00) beating The Samurai in NR up to 48 on August 20 at $1.20. Draws wide but is unbeaten fresh so rates as a leading player.

form.formComment: Recent efforts have been impressive. Last start a big 8 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (1:55.20) beating Avenger in NR up to 58 on April 2 at $1.40. Has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to the lead passing the 1100m.

form.formComment: Racing in great heart. Last start from midfield and won by 1.5 m (Sr3) at Penrith (2:34.80) beating Petes Crunch Time in NR up to 70 on March 20 at $11 at the bell was 5th-5.77. Awkward draw but in-form and expected to go well again.
